images.label: Two figures wrestling at night near a riverbank
images.prompt_used: Create a symbolic cinematic nighttime scene of two ancient figures wrestling near a riverbank, representing Jacob wrestling through the night before meeting Esau. Sacred dramatic atmosphere, semi-realistic painterly style, square or near-square composition, no text, no logos.
images.alt: Two ancient figures wrestling at night near a riverbank

images.label: A camp at night divided into two groups
images.prompt_used: Create an ancient camp at night divided into two groups, with tents, animals, and supplies separated, representing Jacob dividing his camp before meeting Esau. Semi-realistic painterly style, square or near-square composition, no text, no logos.
images.alt: Ancient camp at night divided into two groups with tents and animals

images.label: Servants leading animals ahead as gifts on a journey
images.prompt_used: Create a scene of servants leading animals and gifts ahead on a journey, representing Jacob sending gifts to Esau. Ancient pastoral setting, premium semi-realistic painterly style, square or near-square composition, no text, no logos.
images.alt: Servants leading animals and gifts ahead on a journey

images.label: A family bowing before an approaching group
images.prompt_used: Create a respectful ancient scene of a family bowing in greeting before another approaching group, representing Jacob bowing before Esau. Warm natural light, semi-realistic painterly style, square or near-square composition, no text, no logos.
images.alt: Ancient family bowing in greeting before another approaching group
